targets.rawSql: SELECT cpu_load_percent AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = ${machine_id:sqlstring} ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ram_used_mb AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = ${machine_id:sqlstring} ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT disk_used_gb AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = ${machine_id:sqlstring} ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temp_c AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE "time" > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id = ${machine_id:sqlstring} AND temp_c > 0 ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT avg_rx_mbps AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY "bucket" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT seconds_since_last AS value FROM public.v_uptime_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}'
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", cpu_load_percent AS "CPU Load %" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT "bucket", machine_id, avg_cpu_load, AVG(avg_cpu_load) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(STDDEV(avg_cpu_load) OVER w, 0) AS sigma FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY "bucket" ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT "bucket" AS "time", CASE WHEN sigma > 0 THEN ROUND(((avg_cpu_load - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Anomaly" FROM stats WHERE mu > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", ram_used_mb AS "Used (MB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', "time") AS "time", ram_total_mb AS "Total (MB)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

SELECT mt."time", (mt.interface_metrics->'eth0'->>'rx_mbps')::numeric * 1000000 AS "eth0 RX (bps)", (mt.interface_metrics->'wlan0'->>'rx_mbps')::numeric * 1000000 AS "wlan0 RX (bps)" FROM public.machine_telemetry mt WHERE $__timeFilter(mt."time") AND mt.machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

SELECT mt."time", (mt.interface_metrics->'eth0'->>'tx_mbps')::numeric * -1000000 AS "eth0 TX (bps)", (mt.interface_metrics->'wlan0'->>'tx_mbps')::numeric * -1000000 AS "wlan0 TX (bps)" FROM public.machine_telemetry mt WHERE $__timeFilter(mt."time") AND mt.machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, avg_rx_mbps AS "Download (Mbps)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, (avg_tx_mbps * -1) AS "Upload (Mbps)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

SELECT "time", key AS "Interface", (value->>'errors')::NUMERIC AS "Errors" FROM public.machine_telemetry, jsonb_each(interface_metrics) WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("time") AND key IN (${interface:sqlstring}) AND value ? 'errors' ORDER BY 1

SELECT "time", key AS "Interface", (value->>'drops')::NUMERIC AS "Drops" FROM public.machine_telemetry, jsonb_each(interface_metrics) WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("time") AND key IN (${interface:sqlstring}) AND value ? 'drops' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", max_temp AS "Temperature (°C)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND max_temp > 0 ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT "bucket", machine_id, max_temp, AVG(max_temp) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(STDDEV(max_temp) OVER w, 0) AS sigma FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter("bucket") WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY "bucket" ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT "bucket" AS "time", CASE WHEN sigma > 0 THEN ROUND(((max_temp - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, avg_disk_used AS "Disk Used (GB)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, avg_disk_total AS "Disk Total (GB)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", machine_id AS metric, avg_ram_used AS "RAM Used (MB)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter("bucket") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT "bucket", machine_id, avg_cpu_load, AVG(avg_cpu_load) OVER w AS moving_avg, COALESCE(STDDEV(avg_cpu_load) OVER w, 0) AS moving_stddev FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY "bucket" ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT "bucket" AS "time", CASE WHEN moving_stddev > 0 THEN (avg_cpu_load - moving_avg) / moving_stddev ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats WHERE moving_avg > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", total_rx_errors AS "RX Errors" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY 1
SELECT "bucket" AS "time", total_rx_drops AS "RX Drops" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket") ORDER BY 1
SELECT net_if_status AS "value" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT SUM(total_rx_errors) AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")
SELECT SUM(total_rx_drops) AS value FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")

WITH agg AS (SELECT SUM(total_rx_errors + total_rx_drops) AS total_issues, SUM(total_rx_errors + total_rx_drops + (avg_rx_mbps * 60 * 125000)) AS total_packets FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' AND $__timeFilter("bucket")) SELECT CASE WHEN total_packets > 0 THEN ROUND(((total_issues::NUMERIC / total_packets::NUMERIC) * 100)::NUMERIC, 4) ELSE 0 END AS value FROM agg
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_throughput AS "Throughput (units/sec)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_pe AS "PE (%)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_je AS "JE (%)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_humidity AS "Humidity (%)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_power AS "Power (W)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("time", $__interval), ldi_vibration AS "Vibration (mm/s)" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ldi_pe AS "PE", ldi_je AS "JE", EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - "time"))::int AS "Age" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT 10 AS "PE Upper", 10 AS "JE Upper" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}' LIMIT 1

SELECT "time", cpu_load_percent AS cpu_pct, (ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100) AS ram_pct, (disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100) AS disk_pct, temp_c AS temp, net_rx_errors AS rx_err, net_rx_drops AS rx_drop, net_if_status AS if_status FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE machine_id = '${machine_id}' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: WiFi Signal Strength (RSSI)
panels.description: Received Signal Strength Indicator. -50 dBm = Excellent, -70 dBm = Good, -80 dBm = Poor

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeFilter("time") AS time,
  wifi_rssi AS "RSSI (dBm)",
  machine_id
FROM public.machine_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}'
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: WiFi Signal Quality (SNR)
panels.description: Signal-to-Noise Ratio. >25 dB = Excellent, 15-25 dB = Fair, <15 dB = Poor

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeFilter("time") AS time,
  wifi_snr AS "SNR (dB)",
  machine_id
FROM public.machine_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND machine_id = '${machine_id}'
ORDER BY time ASC

list.name: machine_id
list.label: Machine
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM public.machine_telemetry ORDER BY machine_id

list.name: interface
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT key AS interface FROM public.machine_telemetry, jsonb_each(interface_metrics) WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY key
list.label: Interface
